recommendations.title: Justice League: The Flashpoint Paradox
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Flash finds himself in a war-torn alternate timeline and teams up with alternate versions of his fellow heroes to restore the timeline.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.overview: Dr. Stephen Strange embarks on a wondrous journey to the heights of a Tibetan mountain, where he seeks healing at the feet of the mysterious Ancient One.
recommendations.director: Jay Oliva, Patrick Archibald, Dick Sebast

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 2
recommendations.overview: Batman has stopped the reign of terror that The Mutants had cast upon his city.  Now an old foe wants a reunion and the government wants The Man of Steel to put a stop to Batman.

recommendations.title: Batman: Bad Blood
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Animation, Adventure, Crime
recommendations.overview: When Batman goes missing, it takes the entire Bat "family" - including Batwoman and Batwing - to keep the peace in Gotham and unravel the mystery behind the Dark Knight's disappearance.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 1
recommendations.overview: Batman has not been seen for ten years. A new breed of criminal ravages Gotham City, forcing 55-year-old Bruce Wayne back into the cape and cowl. But, does he still have what it takes to fight crime in a new era?

recommendations.title: Batman vs. Robin
recommendations.overview: Damian Wayne is having a hard time coping with his father's "no killing" rule. Meanwhile, Gotham is going through hell with threats such as the insane Dollmaker, and the secretive Court of Owls.

recommendations.title: The Invincible Iron Man
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Action, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When a cocky industrialist's efforts to raise an ancient Chinese temple leads him to be seriously wounded and captured by enemy forces, he must use his ideas for a revolutionary power armor in order to fight back as a superhero.
recommendations.director: Frank Paur, Jay Oliva, Patrick Archibald

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns
recommendations.overview: Batman has not been seen for ten years. A new breed of criminal ravages Gotham City, forcing fifty-five-year-old Bruce Wayne back into the cape and cowl, but does he still have what it takes to fight crime in a new era?

recommendations.title: Justice League: War
recommendations.overview: The world is under attack by an alien armada led by the powerful Apokoliptian, Darkseid. A group of superheroes consisting of Superman, Batman, Wonder Woman, The Flash, Green Lantern, Cyborg, and Shazam must set aside their differences and gather tog

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Drama
recommendations.overview: As the home planet of the Green Lantern Corps faces a battle with an ancient enemy, Hal Jordan prepares new recruit Arisia for the coming conflict by relating stories of the first Green Lantern and several of Hal's comrades.
recommendations.director: Lauren Montgomery, Jay Oliva, Christopher Berkeley
